{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Anthem
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Anthem]] is a substance or power mentioned by [[Fletcher]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Anthem]] is a substance or concept that can be sought as an alternative.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
